payload.label: tv
payload.long_description: Partial bottom-cropped black flat-screen TV with a glossy, turned-off screen showing a faint lamp reflection at left, thin bezel, and a small pale adhesive or label on the lower-right; cables and dark reflections are visible beneath — estimated ~1.5 m from camera.
